ocr_findings.description: '課報員' in OCR for スパイウェア語源 — image reads '諜報員' (spy/intelligence agent). Single kanji substitution, meaning recoverable from context.

reviewer_notes: Page covers malware taxonomy: マルウェア, ボット, スパイウェア, ランサムウェア, トロイの木馬. All definitions and 語源 (etymology) boxes are present and faithfully captured. One kanji substitution in 'Spy=課報員' (should be 諜報員) is low-severity.
